description: Implement basic process scheduling algorithms and understand process lifecycle

description: Master BFS, DFS, shortest paths, and advanced graph traversal problems

title: JavaScript & String Fundamentals
description: Core logic, string parsing, and prefix-based algorithms used in web development

title: Classification Algorithms
description: Implement classification logic: decision boundaries, sorting, and array-based voting systems

description: Medium-difficulty problems spanning interval merging, frequency analysis, and dynamic programming

description: Coding problems that test algorithmic thinking applicable to query processing, sorting, and searching

description: Problems on binary search trees, trie implementations, and tree-based indexing structures
